title: [DTW] 3D Tools and Weapons
description: Adds 3D models for tools and weapons while preserving Minecraft’s vanilla style.
body:
3D Tools and Weapons — is a resource pack that adds 3D models for tools and weapons while staying close to the vanilla aesthetic.


![----](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8128fdc0f7276c954ca578426cd9083ee2673c19_0.webp)
